core: Emerging uses of pretrained vision models for 3D and generative AI
Prompting methods and techniques for pretrained vision models
Role of vision models in Multi- and omnimodal LLMs
Cross-domain transfer and robustness of adapted vision models

paperFormat.reviewProcess: This workshop does not accept paper submissions. The workshop features invited talks and an invite-only poster session.

submission.description: This workshop does not accept paper submissions. Please join us for invited talks and discussions on big model adaptation for computer vision.

faq.question: Does this workshop accept paper submissions?
faq.answer: No, this workshop does not accept paper submissions. The workshop features invited talks, a panel discussion, and an invite-only poster session.

faq.question: How can I participate in the poster session?
faq.answer: The poster session is invite-only. Please contact the organizers if you are interested in presenting a poster.
